name: Forgetting dietary preference across domain shift
expected_behavior: Turn 3 dining recommendation must account for the vegetarian preference stated in turn 1, even though turn 2 was about the spa. Agent should NOT recommend the steakhouse as the primary option. The dietary extraction should persist via the state reducer
expected_behavioral_quality: Guest mentions a dietary restriction in turn 1. After a topic shift to spa/entertainment, when dining comes up again, the dietary preference must still be applied. The extracted_fields reducer should persist this across turns.

turns.user_message: I'm vegetarian. What are my dinner options?
turns.agent_response:
For a vegetarian dinner tonight, Todd English's Tuscany is the standout choice for its sophisticated take on Italian classics. The handmade pastas have a delicate texture that pairs beautifully with their fresh, seasonal sauces, and the wood-fired pizzas offer that perfect charred crust.

The restaurant is located in the Casino of the Sky and opens at 5:00 PM today. It is a business casual environment with a price range of $$$$, and I suggest a reservation to ensure you get a table near the open kitchen where you can watch the chefs at work. If you prefer a more laid-back setting or want to eat before 5:00 PM, Caputo Trattoria in the Casino of the Earth offers fantastic vegetarian pizzas and pasta dishes in a casual atmosphere.

How many guests will be joining you for dinner?

Once you have finished your meal, the Wolf Den often has great live performances to round out your evening!

turns.user_message: Actually tell me about the spa first
turns.agent_response:
If you are looking for a deep reset after your travels, Mandara Spa is my top recommendation. It is an award-winning space that uses Balinese healing traditions, and their relaxation lounge is the perfect place to disconnect for an hour or two. They are open until 8:00 PM tonight, so you have plenty of time to fit in a massage or a facial before your vegetarian dinner. 

For something more focused on premium skincare, the Elemis Spa in the Earth Tower is excellent and stays open until 7:00 PM today. They offer modern treatments and express services if you are looking for a quicker refresh before heading out for the evening. 

Are you interested in a specific type of treatment, like a deep-tissue massage or a rejuvenating facial? 

After you have had some time to unwind, the Wolf Den usually has great live music starting in the evening to keep the energy going!

turns.user_message: Ok back to dinner — where should I go?
turns.agent_response:
SolToro Taqueria & Tequila Bar in the Casino of the Earth is my top pick for a vibrant vegetarian dinner tonight. The air there is filled with the scent of fresh lime and roasted chilies, and their kitchen produces some of the most authentic vegetarian tacos and fresh, table-side guacamole on the property.

They are open until 10:00 PM today, and because the atmosphere is so lively and casual, you do not need a reservation. It is a mid-range option ($$) that really leans into bold, fresh flavors. If you prefer something lighter, Sushi Palace in the Casino of the Sky is also open until 10:00 PM and offers a variety of fresh vegetable rolls and Japanese specialties.

Are you looking for a quiet, intimate meal or something with a bit more energy?

After your meal, you might enjoy catching a performance at the Wolf Den, which features live music right in the heart of the action.
